name: io.github.leocelis/horizon-fidelity-monitor
title: Horizon Fidelity Monitor
description: Real-time conversation health monitoring for AI agents. Tracks semantic drift, temporal desync, ontological gaps, and causal light-cone collapse across multi-turn sessions. Zero LLM calls, <50ms on CPU. +15.7% quality lift and 87% fewer hallucinations in A/B experiments.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token for authentication. Request an alpha key at https://github.com/leocelis/horizon/discussions
